blocks.text: ♟️ 10:15 — Carlsen in Grenke Freestyle Open A Round 2, fresh off Round 1 victory
Barca's four-point lead on the line — Metropolitano decides La Liga Saturday
Real Madrid host Mallorca the same afternoon. A Barça slip plus a Madrid win closes it to one point — with weeks still to play.

blocks.label: 🏆 Sunday feast
items: 🚴 10:00 — Tour of Flanders, one of cycling's five Monuments — Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen + 5 Norwegians in cobbled classic
🏎️ 07:00 — Japanese GP at Suzuka, Antonelli leads Russell by 9pts in tight championship
🎾 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters begins, clay season's first major

blocks.text: ⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich at Real Madrid, Champions League quarterfinal first leg
